_comment: SCORE-ONLY public report shape. This is the ONLY shape published to the registry: scores, category grades, and the per-category one-line reason — NEVER source, file paths, or finding locations. This file is an illustrative EXAMPLE/schema, not a real published audit.

maturity.why: build-time fetch-and-execute finding(s) (e.g. a curl|sh install line)
LLM call(s) nested in a loop — cost scales per item
share of symbols are dead / unreachable

disclaimer: Structural, deterministic pre-screen — NOT a certification. 'No findings' means the specific checks did not fire, not that the system is compliant. Reproduce on the code to verify (see VERIFY.md).

signature.value: <base64 ed25519 signature over the deterministic report body>
